message:
chore(beads): merge 92 unique issue records from beads-sync branch

The beads-sync branch (created by the old bd sync process) contained 265
issue records vs main's 173, with 92 unique issues covering tasks like
E2E dedup workflow integration tests, feedback collection, skill synthesis,
and other planning/tracking data. Also brings in metadata.json which was
only present on beads-sync.

This merge preserves all issue tracking history before the branch is deleted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
